# Selah Sound Collective

> Modern Christian music drawn straight from Scripture — over 230 original songs, including all 150 psalms, free to stream with the full lyrics.

Selah Sound Collective is a modern Christian music project that sets passages of the Bible to original songs. The catalogue holds 237 songs spanning 34 books of Scripture, from Genesis to Revelation, including all 150 psalms set to music one by one.

Every song streams free on the site with its full lyrics and the passage it is drawn from. The songs are also on Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, Deezer and Amazon Music.

Funds raised support God's Work and send children to camp.

## Pages

- [Songs](https://selahsoundcollective.com/): the full catalogue, filterable by testament and book
- [Listen](https://selahsoundcollective.com/listen.html): streaming links
- [About](https://selahsoundcollective.com/about.html): the project and the people behind it
- [Support](https://selahsoundcollective.com/support.html): donations
- [Contact](https://selahsoundcollective.com/contact.html): get in touch

- [Worth Every Year](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/worth-every-year.html) — Genesis 29
- [Yet, I Will Rejoice](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/yet-i-will-rejoice.html) — Habakkuk
- [You Are My Rock](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/you-are-my-rock.html) — Psalm 62
- [You Are With Me](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/you-are-with-me.html) — Psalm 23
- [You Know Me](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/you-know-me.html) — Psalm 139
- [You Lift Me Up](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/you-lift-me-up.html) — Psalm 138

- [You Will Find Rest](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/you-will-find-rest.html) — Matthew 11
- [Your Love, My Crown](https://selahsoundcollective.com/songs/your-love-my-crown.html) — Song of Songs 4
